items.name: ScaleConfig
comment: The active line uses `max`; the farthest lines collapse to `min`.

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Whether to enable the scale effect.

fields.name: min
fields.comment: Scale ratio of the farthest line.

fields.name: max
fields.comment: Scale ratio of the active line.

items.name: BlurConfig
comment: The active line uses `min` (sharpest); the farthest lines reach `max` (most blurred).

fields.name: enabled
fields.comment: Whether to enable the blur effect.

fields.name: min
fields.comment: Blur radius of the active line, in `px` — the sharpest state.

fields.name: max
fields.comment: Blur radius of the farthest line, in `px` — the most blurred state.

items.name: Root
comment: Visual effects whose intensity depends on distance from the active line.
Lines closer to the active one keep their natural look; lines farther away progressively shrink and/or blur.

fields.name: scale
fields.comment: Scale (zoom) effect: shrinks lines farther from the active one.

fields.name: blur
fields.comment: Blur effect: blurs lines farther from the active one.
